title: Perfect Celestials (Circular Sun and Moon)
description: Faithful, vanilla-like circular sun and moon.
body:
[![CurseForge](https://i.imgur.com/eBmLp7F.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mjramon) [![Modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/FMq4hOj.png)](https://modrinth.com/organization/aegis-architectum) [![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/v0q5sfn.png)](https://discord.gg/fWW4Atmr69)

Circular sun and moon, faithful to vanilla Minecraft style.
Works both with vanilla and shaders.


## Examples
![Sun: no shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IKnEBn68/images/d7f215fab5aadc2520b803d9e68fec8f2186218f.png)
![Sun: Complementary Reimagined shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IKnEBn68/images/b7266a47a3aa81af3049caccd4681729513193a1.png)
![Moon: no shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IKnEBn68/images/d26544733a39f13b0dc7640de13f830a83adce62.png)
![Moon: Complementary Reimagined shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IKnEBn68/images/0e49b61d26e79a77ad2ecaf984a30fe7ce5857d6.png)
